creator: netinaflash@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 176407
Expression Syntax error from MuParser [Draw Line 2 Points] tool

Built LibreCAD-2.0.8  from ports on fresh GhostBSD 10.3 install.  Date Nov-2-2016

 Have the expression syntax error, when parsing command line inputs larger than 999 (3 digits). Like 4 digits 1000 or 1002. This seems to come from MuParser software 2_2_3  . 

https://sourceforge.net/p/librecad/bugs/457/?page=1

See comment: Dongxu Li - 2014-06-12 
fixed by including patched muparser in code base.

muparser upstream doesn't seem to be active.
